senses.definition: furniture with a usually flat surface on top of one or multiple legs that we can sit at or put things on

examples.x: I cleared the table after dinner and washed the dishes.
The table in the waiting room had magazines for visitors to read.
We played board games on the table during the family game night.

senses.definition: furniture we use for working, writing, reading, etc. that normally has a flat surface and drawers

examples.x: I have a picture frame with a family photo on my desk.
My computer is placed on the desk in the office.
The receptionist sat behind the desk, welcoming visitors.
The student sat down at his desk and opened his notebook.
The teacher placed the books on the desk.

senses.definition: a large table used for playing cue sports, such as pool, billiards, and snooker

examples.x: The family gathered around the billiard table in the basement for a friendly game of pool.
He spent hours practicing his shots on the billiard table at the local club.
They decided to add a billiard table to their game room for some extra fun.
The billiard table was the centerpiece of the entertainment area, drawing guests in for a game.
She carefully lined up the balls on the billiard table, preparing for the break.

senses.definition: a raised counter or bar-like surface that is typically found in the kitchen or dining area and used for casual dining or quick meals

examples.x: She enjoys having her morning coffee at the breakfast bar before starting her workday.
The kitchen features a stylish breakfast bar with high stools for quick meals.
They built a breakfast bar into the kitchen island to save space and create a casual dining area.
We always sit at the breakfast bar for a light snack after school.
The breakfast bar is the perfect spot for my kids to do their homework while I cook.

senses.definition: a small table usually placed in the kitchen or dining area, used for having breakfast or small meals

examples.x: We set up a cozy breakfast table by the window so we could enjoy the morning sunshine.
The breakfast table was already set when I walked into the kitchen, ready for a family meal.
They decided to have a small breakfast table in the corner of their kitchen for a more intimate dining experience.
After a long week, I enjoy sitting down at the breakfast table with a cup of coffee and a good book.
The kids always sit at the breakfast table, eager to start their day with pancakes.

senses.definition: a folding table with legs that can be locked in place, typically used for playing card games

examples.x: We set up the card table in the living room for our weekly game night.
After dinner, we gathered around the card table to play a few rounds of poker.
The kids used the card table for their board games while the adults chatted nearby.
He folded up the card table and stored it in the closet after the game was over.
The card table was perfect for hosting a small family game night during the holidays.

senses.definition: a low table, often placed in a living room, on which magazines, cups, etc. can be placed

examples.x: She placed a stack of magazines on the coffee table for guests to read.
The coffee table was the perfect spot for their drinks and snacks during movie night.
He found a beautiful vintage coffee table at the flea market.
The new coffee table had built-in storage for remote controls and coasters.
They gathered around the coffee table to play board games on a rainy day.

senses.definition: a narrow and usually long table designed to be placed against a wall, typically used for displaying decorative items or as a landing spot for keys and other small items

examples.x: She placed a vase of flowers on the console table by the front door.
The console table in the hallway holds the keys and mail for easy access.
I bought a stylish console table to add some charm to my living room.
The console table behind the sofa holds a lamp and a few books for reading.
He put his wallet and phone on the console table as he entered the house.

senses.definition: a table with a narrow horizontal surface over which goods are put or people are served

examples.x: The cashier stood behind the counter.
They placed their bags on the counter at the shop.
She cleaned the counter after the customers left.
The bakery displayed its cakes on the counter.
He leaned on the counter while waiting for his coffee.

senses.definition: a table on which people have meals

examples.x: The family gathered around the dining table for a holiday meal.
She set the dining table with plates, glasses, and silverware before dinner.
After dinner, they cleared the dishes from the dining table and relaxed.
The dining table was large enough to seat eight people comfortably.
They decided to buy a larger dining table to accommodate the growing family.

senses.definition: a low, mirrored table, often with drawers, that is used to see oneself when grooming or dressing oneself

examples.x: She sat at her dressing table, carefully applying her makeup before the big event.
The antique dressing table was a cherished piece passed down from her grandmother.
He bought a new dressing table with plenty of drawers for all her grooming essentials.
The room was furnished with a beautiful dressing table complete with a large mirror.
Every morning, she spent a few minutes at her dressing table, getting ready for the day.

senses.definition: a type of table that has a hinged section on either side that can be raised or lowered to increase or decrease the table's surface area

examples.x: We set up the drop-leaf table in the living room for the holiday gathering, then folded it away after the meal.
I love how the drop-leaf table expands to fit extra guests during parties but doesn't take up much room otherwise.
The drop-leaf table can be folded down to create more space for other activities when we don't need it for eating.
We use the drop-leaf table in our office as both a desk and a place for extra guests when they come over.

senses.definition: a type of round table with a circular top and a cylindrical base resembling a drum, often featuring drawers or compartments for storage

examples.x: The living room was enhanced by the addition of a stylish drum table, which became the centerpiece of the space.
The drum table's intricate wood carvings gave the room a sophisticated, vintage feel.
She placed a vase of flowers on the drum table, adding a touch of elegance to the entryway.
We used the drum table as a coffee table in our cozy living room, where it provided both function and charm.
Guests admired the antique drum table that had been passed down through generations.

senses.definition: a small writing desk with drawers and compartments for storing writing materials

examples.x: The antique escritoire in the corner of the room was a gift from her grandmother.
I love writing letters at my escritoire, as it gives me a sense of calm and focus.
The escritoire, with its intricate carvings, added a touch of elegance to the office.
He carefully organized the papers inside the escritoire to keep everything neat.

senses.definition: a type of table that is designed to be easily folded up for storage or transportation, typically featuring hinged legs that collapse inward towards the tabletop

examples.x: We used a folding table for the party, so we could easily store it afterward.
The folding table is perfect for outdoor picnics, as it can be packed away when not needed.
I always keep a folding table in the garage for extra workspace when I'm working on projects.
For the yard sale, we set up several folding tables to display all the items for sale.
The folding table is lightweight, making it easy to carry to different events.

senses.definition: a type of table with hinged leaves that can be folded down for easy storage

examples.x: The antique gateleg table in the corner of the room adds a touch of elegance and can be extended when guests arrive.
She carefully set the plates on the extended gateleg table, which comfortably fit all the guests for dinner.
The gateleg table in the kitchen is perfect for family meals, as it can be expanded when we need extra space.
After the party, we folded the gateleg table to make room for other activities in the living room.

senses.definition: a type of table usually located in a kitchen, used for dining, food preparation, and other household activities

examples.x: We gathered around the kitchen table for breakfast this morning.
She set the flowers on the kitchen table to brighten up the room.
I love having coffee in the morning while sitting at my kitchen table by the window.
He spilled coffee on the kitchen table while trying to juggle multiple things at once.

senses.definition: a set of two or more tables of graduated size that can be stacked together to save space when not in use

examples.x: The living room looked more organized with the nest of tables tucked neatly in the corner.
The nest of tables was perfect for the small apartment, as they could be easily stacked away when not needed.
When guests arrived, I pulled out the nest of tables to offer extra surface space for drinks.
The nest of tables came in handy during the party when everyone needed a place to set their plates.
Instead of using a bulky coffee table, I chose a nest of tables for more flexibility in the living room.

senses.definition: a small table used as and when needed for displaying decorative items, holding drinks, or as an extra surface for a specific purpose

examples.x: The living room feels complete with the addition of a stylish occasional table beside the couch.
I placed my coffee cup on the occasional table while I read my book.
The occasional table by the window holds a small vase of fresh flowers.
When guests arrive, we pull out the occasional tables for extra surface space.
The occasional table in the hallway is perfect for setting down keys and mail.

senses.definition: a type of desk with drawers and/or cabinets built into one or both sides of a central pedestal or column that supports the tabletop

examples.x: She sat at her pedestal desk, organizing the paperwork that had piled up over the week.
After the move, they placed the pedestal desk near the window for natural light during the day.
The pedestal desk in the corner of the room was the perfect place for him to work from home.
With its drawers on either side, the pedestal desk helped keep the office organized and clutter-free.
He admired the elegant design of the new pedestal desk, which fit perfectly in his small office.

senses.definition: a small, light table with drop leaves that can be folded down to save space, typically with a single drawer and sometimes with additional storage compartments

examples.x: She folded the leaves of the Pembroke table down to save space when not in use.
The antique Pembroke table added a touch of elegance to the hallway.
He placed the lamp on the Pembroke table next to the armchair.
The Pembroke table is versatile, offering extra space when the leaves are extended for guests.
They used the Pembroke table as a writing desk, taking advantage of its compact size.

senses.definition: a type of small, circular table with a decorative edge resembling the crimped edge of a pie crust, often used as a side table or display table for decorative items

examples.x: The antique piecrust table in the corner added a touch of elegance to the living room.
She placed a vase of fresh flowers on the piecrust table next to the window.
The piecrust table was a perfect fit for the small space by the door.
The intricate woodwork on the piecrust table made it the centerpiece of the room.
At the estate sale, I found a beautiful piecrust table that was in great condition.

senses.definition: a long, narrow table with a plank top and trestle-style base, originally used in monasteries for communal meals, now used in dining rooms and as a decorative piece

examples.x: The large refectory table in the dining room easily seats twelve people for family meals.
They gathered around the refectory table in the old church hall for their communal dinner.
For the wedding reception, they rented a refectory table to accommodate all the guests.
The children sat at the refectory table, enjoying their lunch after a busy morning at school.
The monks ate their meals in silence around the refectory table, as tradition dictated.

senses.definition: a desk with a flexible wooden cover that rolls down over the desktop to secure papers and items inside, with stacked shelves, drawers, and cubbyholes for storage

examples.x: The roll-top desk in the study provides a tidy workspace with plenty of storage for office supplies.
She pulled the slatted cover of the roll-top desk down to keep her papers safe from dust.
The roll-top desk was filled with neatly organized compartments, perfect for keeping everything in its place.
I love the vintage style of the roll-top desk in the corner of the room; it adds so much character.
The old roll-top desk in the attic had been passed down for generations, still in great condition.

senses.definition: a small table that is often situated next to a sofa or other furniture

examples.x: She placed her cup of coffee on the end table next to the couch.
The end table in the living room held a decorative vase and a stack of magazines.
I need to buy a new end table for the space next to my armchair.
He knocked over the lamp on the end table when he reached for his phone.

senses.definition: a large, rectangular table with pockets and elevated edges, used for playing the game of snooker, a type of billiards with 22 balls

examples.x: The snooker table in the game room was so large that it took up almost an entire wall.
The group of friends enjoyed a friendly competition on the snooker table after dinner.
The snooker table at the pub was always busy with players practicing their shots.
I decided to buy a snooker table for my basement to have some fun with friends and family.

senses.definition: a small, decorative table with a hinged or removable top, often used for storing tea or other small items, and commonly found in Indian and Southeast Asian homes
a small table designed for serving or enjoying tea, often used in living rooms or dining areas

examples.x: He placed the tray of snacks on the tea table by the window.
The tea table was beautifully set with a floral cloth and matching teacups.
The small tea table fit perfectly in the corner of the cozy living room.
The children sat at the tea table, pretending to host a fancy tea party.
They gathered around the tea table to enjoy an afternoon of conversation and treats.

senses.definition: a table with a simple frame consisting of two or three trestles supporting a flat top

examples.x: The family gathered around the trestle table for their Thanksgiving dinner.
The large trestle table in the dining room was perfect for hosting dinner parties.
The rustic charm of the trestle table fit perfectly with the farmhouse-style kitchen.
He built a beautiful trestle table for the new kitchen using reclaimed wood.
They used a trestle table as a temporary workspace during the home renovation.

senses.definition: a table designed for changing babies' diapers, often with storage for supplies

examples.x: She placed the baby on the changing table to change his diaper.
The nursery had a sturdy changing table with a soft pad for comfort.
He kept baby wipes and diapers in the drawers of the changing table.
The changing table had a safety belt to keep the baby secure while being changed.
He quickly changed the baby on the changing table before they went out.

senses.definition: a type of outdoor furniture with a horizontal tabletop and attached benches or seats, designed to seat multiple people

examples.x: We sat at the picnic table in the park, enjoying a sunny afternoon and a homemade lunch.
The children played around the picnic table while the adults set up the barbecue.
A large picnic table was placed near the lake, offering a perfect view for our lunch.
After the hike, we rested at a wooden picnic table, eating sandwiches and chatting.
We reserved a picnic table at the beach for our annual summer get-together.

senses.definition: a desk with drawers and a writing surface on top that opens downwards
a type of small writing desk with a slanted top that opens to reveal a flat writing surface and drawers or compartments for storage
